thesis: Global leader in phakic Implantable Collamer® Lenses (ICLs) for vision correction. EVO ICL product line with 4+ million lenses sold globally. ~60% revenue concentration in China creates significant opportunity and risk. Q1 2026 pre-announcement beat ($90M+ vs $67.6M consensus) drove 25% stock rally, suggesting potential turnaround after 24% revenue decline in FY2025. FDA expanded age indication in Feb 2026 opens larger addressable market.

drivers: China market fully recovers, driving 20%+ revenue growth
Company returns to profitability by FY2026
Market awards 30x+ P/E on restored earnings power

risks: Company fails to return to profitability
Cash burn forces dilutive capital raise

base_case.assumptions: China stabilizes but doesn't accelerate; Revenue grows 10-15% annually; Breakeven profitability by late FY2026; Stock trades sideways as turnaround plays out; Multiple compression offsets earnings growth.

catalysts.event: Q1 2026 Earnings Call — Guidance update critical
China Economic Data — Impacts 60% of revenue

key_risks: 60% revenue concentration in China — regulatory/economic vulnerability
Competition from LASIK and SMILE procedures
Single product risk — ~95% of revenue from ICL products
